title: Clair de Lune Salisbury Pushchair Liner (Black)
features: Soft, fleece lining for your little one's pushchair
Range includes:- Car Seat Footmuff, Pushchair Liner, Footmuff and Parasol
description: Product Description This contemporary and fully co-ordinating range of Clair de Lune Salisbury accessories are ideal to brighten up your pushchair and car seats, keeping your baby snug and comfortable. Available in a range of colours, these have a range of accessories to match including Changing Bags, Car Seat Footmuffs and Pushchair Footmuffs. Clair de Lune continue to design and manufacture quality nursery bedding and nursery accessories after 71 years of business. What more does a parent yearn for than the best quality they can buy when choosing products for their newborn baby and children? Box Contains 1 x Pushchair Liner
